sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94758" key="skeuwro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκευωρ-ός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n94758.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σκευοφύλαξ</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:159" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">159</biblScope></bibl>. (In late Gr. written <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκαιωρ-έω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκευωρ-ία</orth>, etc. (qq. v.) with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-αι-</foreign> representing <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκεύωρ-ε-</orth> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παρασκεάζω, σκεοθήκα, σκεοφύλαξ</foreign>, etc.).)</sense> </entryFree>
